title: nematanthus dichrus
intro: Nematanthus dichrus, also known as Gold Dust Plant, is a low-growing, evergreen shrub native to Central and South America. It is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae, commonly used in ornamental horticulture for its attractive, gold-speckled leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been shown to have potential medicinal uses in treating various health issues. Herbal preparations of Nematanthus dichrus are made by infusing the leaves in water or oil, and have been traditionally used to aid digestion and reduce symptoms of anxiety and insomnia.
